Issues: Lack of technical polish: The lines and coloring appear uneven and rushed, which reduces professional appeal for commercial use.
Low commercial appeal: The image is very simple and generic. While the concept (cityscape) is fine, the execution does not stand out significantly enough to command high sales.
Lack of uniqueness: The style is simplistic and doesn't offer a distinct, high-value artistic vision, making it easily replaceable.
Print Quality Concerns: The uneven application of color and line weight may result in poor quality when printed at high resolution.
